weight_transform: Stack per-expert projection weights along the expert dimension into a single tensor of shape [1, E, K, N] (gate_proj/up_proj: K=hidden_size, N=intermediate_size_per_device; down_proj: K=intermediate_size_per_device, N=hidden_size). Weights stay in [K, N] orientation (no transpose). Sparsity tensor encodes per-token/per-group expert selection with nnz = num_experts_per_tok (decode/top_k) or num active experts per chunk (prefill).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: prefill gate/up projection output: [1, E, chunk_len, intermediate_size], chunk_len = long sequence chunk
placement_observations.source: model call site (MoE prefill gate/up projection)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: prefill down projection output: [1, E, chunk_len, hidden_size]; input_a is sparse (is_input_a_sparse=True); processed in seq splits to bound memory
placement_observations.source: model call site (MoE prefill down projection, streamed splits)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode gate/up projection output: [batch_size, E, intermediate_size_per_device] (seq_len == batch tokens, small)
placement_observations.source: model call site (MoE decode gate/up projection)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode down projection output: [1, E, batch_tokens, hidden_size]; input_a sparse (is_input_a_sparse=True)
placement_observations.source: model call site (MoE decode down projection)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: general / parametrized shapes (all sparsity combinations: a-sparse, b-sparse, both)
